message:
Add separator between adjacent code blocks in test-packages guide

Code blocks styled with TQL syntax were being merged together during
rendering. Add descriptive text between them to preserve their distinct
examples and improve clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -133,6 +133,8 @@ from {hash: "abc123"}
 acme::tag indicator
 ```
 
+With a custom prefix:
+
 ```tql title="tests/tag-with-prefix.tql"
 from {hash: "abc123"}
 acme::tag indicator, prefix="IOC: "
